signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Token Holders (Record) | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders as of mid-April, with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million.[3][5]

signals.raw:
Ethereum Transaction Activity Up 41% | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ethereum transactions jumped 41% over a seven-day period in mid-April, reclaiming activity leadership from Solana, driven by Layer 2 bridging activity and tokenized treasury issuance.[1]

signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Approved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Approved | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana validators approved the Alpenglow consensus upgrade, which reduces transaction finality from 12 seconds to under 200 milliseconds. This is positioned as a major technical milestone that could enable high-frequency trading and real-time payment workloads.[1][3]
